sections.paragraph:
Original: הדר

Transliteration: hâdar

Phonetic: haw-dar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to honour, adorn, glorify, be high
    1. (Qal)
      1. to swell
        1. swelling (passive participle)
      2. to honour, pay honour to, show partiality
      3. to adorn
        1. adorned (passive participle)
    2. (Niphal) to be honoured
    3. (Hithpael) to honour oneself, claim honour

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 477

Part(s) of speech: Verb
